nasb.text: Then they gave it into the hands of the workmen who had the oversight of the house of the Lord, and the workmen who were working in the house of the Lord used it to restore and repair the house.

esv.text: And they gave it to the workmen who were working in the house of the Lord. And the workmen who were working in the house of the Lord gave it for repairing and restoring the house.

cnv.text: 他們又把銀子交給在耶和華殿裡負責監察的人；他們又把銀子發給在耶和華殿裡作工的工人，去修補聖殿。

ccb.text: 他们把银子交给负责管理耶和华殿的督工，由他们转交给整修耶和华殿的工人，
